title: Read-only rootless containers fail to run
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

Rootless containers run read-only will fail to start. If you add a terminal, we get a horribly non-helpful EOF error reading the Conmon JSON response (I thought we fixed that, but evidently not). If you don't add a terminal, you get a more helpful error message (an EPERM trying to bind-mount in /etc/hostname).

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman run --rm --read-only -i busybox sh`

**Describe the results you received:**

```
ERRO[0001] container create failed: container_linux.go:344: starting container process caused "process_linux.go:424: container init caused \"rootfs_linux.go:58: mounting \\\"/run/user/1000/overlay-containers/92e6155e155eac348d14f513e82a9e4712e07531ebc320747556a05b0f3deb5e/userdata/hostname\\\" to rootfs \\\"/home/mheon/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/7b316a76798dd7196477d90cbbdf5195a2e38ede26330b2eea9c1b518f3731ea/merged\\\" at \\\"/home/mheon/.local/share/containers/storage/overlay/7b316a76798dd7196477d90cbbdf5195a2e38ede26330b2eea9c1b518f3731ea/merged/etc/hostname\\\" caused \\\"operation not permitted\\\"\""
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Container runs successfully, no gigantic error messages

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

Fedora packaged v1.0

**Output of `podman info`:**

Nothing unusual - stock install on AMD64

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

comments.body: it seems to be already fixed in master.  I could see it failing on the Fedora package but master works fine
Confirmed here - master's fixed. Closing as such.
